title: execution-observability: wire CI 4-job protocol (typecheck-and-tests / standard-baseline / standard-pr / metrics-contract) feeding keryx standard baseline

AC2.note: standard-baseline checkout ref:main, outputs.status via never-hard-fail if/else capture step

AC3.note: standard-pr validates PR then standard baseline --baseline needs.standard-baseline.outputs.status --pr steps.pr.outputs.status; probed exits: green+fail=1, red+fail=0

AC5.note: tui-pty-launch/linux-sandbox/opentui-native-matrix preserved verbatim; security eval gate retained in typecheck-and-tests

AC6.note: YAML parses (ruby): 7 jobs listed; standard validate exit 0 local; metrics tests green; GH Actions green observable only post-push (documented)

AC7.note: journal.md records deferred benchmark run + REQUIRED admin branch-protection required-check rename
